dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Anne. The village is falling apart. What do you know?

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: More than I should, less than I'd like. Sarah's locked in the lab — and from what I hear, she's not well anymore.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Infected?

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: That's the word. She was close to something before it took her. A cure, maybe. The key to the lab — it's not in the village. Someone hid it in the graveyard. Don't ask me why.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: And the power?

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Out. George at the powerstation can flip it back on, but he needs a fuse. Last one I knew of was inside the lab itself. Circular little nightmare, isn't it?

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I'll figure it out.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: I know you will. Watch the village on your way — it's not safe out there anymore.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: George. I need the laboratory powered up.

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Can't. No fuse. Grid's hot, but the line into the lab is dead until I have one.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: There's a fuse inside the lab. I'll get it, bring it back.

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Bring it here. I'll route the power the moment it's in. That's all I need.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Understood.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Sarah. Stay with me. I'm going to fix this.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: The sample... hospital. Second floor. I had it ready before the fever took hold.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Cure sample. Got it. And the synthesizer here?

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Works. Just needs power. Bring the sample back. The machine will do the rest. You'll have one dose.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: One dose is all I need. Hold on.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Marcus. I'm here for the cure sample Sarah left.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Vial. Cold storage. Haven't touched it.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: You're holding this place alone?

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Holding it fine. Take what you need. Don't waste it.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I won't. Sarah's infected. This is for her.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Then move. Talk later.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Power's on. I have the sample.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Good. Load it into the synthesizer. The cycle is automated — you'll get a single antidote dose.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: And then it goes to you.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Yes. Quickly. I can feel it spreading.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Hold on, Sarah.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Sarah's cured. She's back on her feet.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: That's the best news I've heard in a long time. But one antidote doesn't save a village.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I know. She'll need more samples, more work. And we need somewhere safe to do it from.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Then start with the store. Reinforce it. People are going to be coming through here, and if this place falls, the village does too.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I have wood. I'll board it up.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Do it. And be careful — Viktor's people have been watching the roads.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: How are you holding up?

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Steady. The antidote worked cleanly — better than I dared hope. But one dose is a proof of concept, not a solution.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: What do you need from me?

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Time, and a lab that doesn't get overrun. Board the doors. I'll handle the rest.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Consider it done.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Sarah, something doesn't add up. The outbreak, Viktor's grip on the village, the missing supplies — it's too coordinated to be chance.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: I've had the same suspicion. The strain I've been analyzing isn't natural drift. Someone engineered it.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Engineered? You're sure?

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: The markers are too clean. Whoever made it had a lab — and the discipline to use it properly. That points to one person.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: The Doctor. At the outpost.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Logically, yes. But before you walk into Viktor's territory, talk to Anne at the store. She hears things. If anyone in the village knows who has been coming and going from that outpost, it's her.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: And then?

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Then you find the proof. I'll keep working here. Be careful — if I'm right, this isn't a man you confront empty-handed.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: You've got that look. The one people get when they've started asking questions they can't unask.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Viktor. The Doctor. Who's really running things at that outpost?

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Viktor likes the world to think it's him. But the orders flow the other way. The Doctor sends men down here for supplies, and Viktor's people deliver.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: You're certain?

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: I see who pays for what, and who flinches when whose name comes up. Viktor flinches at the Doctor's. That tells you everything.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: There's an old key in the cave outside the village — opens the first gate of the outpost. One of Viktor's men dropped it weeks ago running from something. I'd start there.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Thank you, Anne.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Don't thank me. Just finish what you're starting.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Linda. I'm heading to the outpost. The Doctor's behind all of this.

dialogue_content.speaker: linda
dialogue_content.line: Figured someone like him was, eventually. Men in clean coats usually are.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I'll need supplies. If this goes long, people will need food when it's over.

dialogue_content.speaker: linda
dialogue_content.line: Take what's by the gate. I packed it days ago. Had a feeling someone would come for it.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: You're not coming?

dialogue_content.speaker: linda
dialogue_content.line: I keep the farm. You keep the rest. That's the trade.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Marcus. I'm going to the outpost. The Doctor's the one who started all of this.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Figured. Viktor's not the brains type.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I need to know what I'm walking into.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Three gates. First's locked — you'll need a key. Viktor patrols the middle. Doctor stays in the back where it's quiet. He won't fight you. He'll talk.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Talk?

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Men like him think words are weapons. Don't let him finish a sentence he doesn't need to. Get what you came for and get out.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Understood.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Hospital stays standing while you're gone. Go.

parameters.parameter_note: moving past Viktor at outpost2 toward the Doctor

dialogue_content.speaker: viktor
dialogue_content.line: You came all the way up here. I admire the effort. Misplaced, but admirable.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Step aside, Viktor. You're not the one I came for.

dialogue_content.speaker: viktor
dialogue_content.line: Oh? And who is?

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: The man giving you orders.

dialogue_content.speaker: viktor
dialogue_content.line: Careful. Words like that get people killed.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Then you already know I'm right. Last chance — move.

dialogue_content.speaker: viktor
dialogue_content.line: Go. See him. When you come back through here, we'll have a different conversation.

dialogue_content.speaker: the_doctor
dialogue_content.line: You made it further than I anticipated. The variables held longer than expected.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: You did this. The outbreak. All of it.

dialogue_content.speaker: the_doctor
dialogue_content.line: I refined it. The mechanism existed. I made it efficient. Viktor provided the conditions. You — you provided the unexpected pressure.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: People are dying.

dialogue_content.speaker: the_doctor
dialogue_content.line: People die regardless. What I'm doing will be remembered. Your moral discomfort will not.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I'm taking your work. Every note, every sample. Sarah will undo what you've done.

dialogue_content.speaker: the_doctor
dialogue_content.line: Then take it. The data outlives the man. That has always been the point.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: We'll see how proud you are of that when this is over.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: George. I confirmed it. The Doctor engineered the outbreak. Viktor's just the enforcer.

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Figured as much. Bad systems usually have one designer.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Sarah's going to need power held steady at the lab. Whatever she builds next has to work the first time.

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Grid's stable. Keep it that way is the job. I'll keep it that way.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Good. Hold the line here. I'll handle the rest.

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Go.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: You look like a man who just walked through a fire.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Close enough. I got into the outpost. Got proof. Got a toolkit, too — looks like the one your boat needs.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Hand it over and we'll see.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Not yet. I need it for one more thing first — getting you off this island is going to take more than tools. We'll need lumber, and Sarah will need her work intact.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Fair. You bring me what I need, I take whoever wants out. That's the deal.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Deal.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: You were right. The Doctor admitted everything. He engineered the strain. Viktor's just muscle.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Then we have a name and a source. That changes the work.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I brought a toolkit out of his lab. And I've still got wood. Whatever you need built, broken, or reinforced — we have the means.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Good. Hold onto both. The next phase is the cure itself, and we'll need every resource we have.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: What about him? The Doctor?

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: He'll keep working until something stops him. That's a problem for the next step. For now — we know what we're fighting, and that's more than we had yesterday.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Then let's finish it.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: We will. Rest. Tomorrow we end this.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Sarah. There's a boat at the dock. Mary's trying to get it running.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Then that's our way out. The research here is as far as it can go without proper facilities — I can continue it elsewhere.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Mary will need a toolkit and lumber to patch the hull. I've got both.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Good. Go to her first. Then we'll need to gather everyone worth saving — Anne, George, Linda, Marcus. No one gets left behind on this rock.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: And Viktor?

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Viktor isn't a problem we solve. He's a problem we leave behind. Move quickly — and quietly.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: You look like someone with news. Good kind or bad kind?

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Good kind. I brought a toolkit and a length of wood. Enough to patch her up?

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: More than enough, if you've got hands to help. Hull's the worst of it — rest is just stubborn.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Then let's get her seaworthy. There are people on this island who need to be on that deck when she sails.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Bring 'em. Boat takes who fits, and I don't ask questions about anyone running from this place.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: You've got that look. The 'I'm about to ask something difficult' look.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Mary's boat is fixed. We're leaving the island. Tonight.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Are you, now.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I want you on it. You've kept half this village alive without anyone noticing. You've earned a way out.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Kind of you to say. I'll close the shutters and meet you at the dock. Tell George on your way — he won't leave that grid unless someone tells him to.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Already on my list.

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Grid's stable. What do you need?

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Nothing from the grid. From you. There's a boat at the dock — repaired. We're leaving.

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Leaving where to?

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Anywhere that isn't here. Sarah, Anne, Mary, Marcus, Linda. You.

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Hm. Lights'll go out eventually anyway. Fine. I'll shut down the load and meet you there.

dialogue_content.speaker: linda
dialogue_content.line: Don't usually get visitors this late.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Linda. There's a boat at the dock. It leaves tonight. There's a seat for you.

dialogue_content.speaker: linda
dialogue_content.line: Land's been good to me. Hard to walk away from it.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Land won't be land much longer. Not with Viktor's people pushing out from the outpost.

dialogue_content.speaker: linda
dialogue_content.line: ...I'll bring what I can carry. Won't slow you down.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Meet us at the dock. Don't be late.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: You shouldn't be up here without a weapon.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I'm not here to fight. We're getting off the island. Boat's fixed. Leaving tonight.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Who's on it?

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Anyone willing to come. Sarah. Anne. George. Linda. Mary. You.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: And Viktor?

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Staying. Along with whatever's left of his outpost.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Good. I'll cover the rear march to the dock. You lead. Move.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: It's done. Everyone's been told. They're all moving toward the dock.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Even Marcus?

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Even Marcus. He's covering the rear.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Then there's nothing left for me here. Let me grab my notes. Take this — supplies for the crossing. We don't know how long we'll be at sea.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I'll bring them to Mary. Meet you on the boat.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Hull's holding. Engine's purring. You bring me passengers?

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: All of them. They're on their way.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Then we cast off the moment the last boot hits the deck.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Here — food supplies for the crossing. Sarah sent them.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Smart woman. Hand 'em over. I'll stow them below.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: We're really doing this.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Aye. We really are.
